name: Circle 1 in
notes: 1-inch aiming dot. 1 MOA at 100 yards.

name: Circle 2 in
notes: 2-inch aiming dot. Common load-development reference.

name: Circle 3 in
notes: 3-inch aiming dot. Standard 100-yard sight-in bull.

name: Circle 4 in
notes: 4-inch aiming circle. Common pistol bullseye at 25 yards.

name: Circle 5 in
notes: 5-inch aiming circle.

name: Circle 6 in
notes: 6-inch round plate. Common 100-300 yard rifle gong.

name: Circle 8 in
notes: 8-inch round plate. Standard mid-range rifle gong.

name: Circle 10 in
notes: 10-inch round plate. Common action-pistol / mid-range size.

name: Circle 12 in
notes: 12-inch round plate. Common 500-yard rifle gong.

name: Circle 15 in
notes: 15-inch round plate.

name: Circle 18 in
notes: 18-inch round plate. Long-range gong (1000-yard typical).

name: Circle 20 in
notes: 20-inch round plate.

name: Circle 24 in
notes: 24-inch round plate. ELR / 1500+ yard gong.

name: Square 4 in
notes: 4-inch square aiming patch.

name: Square 6 in
notes: 6-inch square plate.

name: Square 8 in
notes: 8-inch square plate.

name: Square 10 in
notes: 10-inch square plate.

name: Square 12 in
notes: 12-inch square plate.

name: Rectangle 12x18 in
notes: 12x18 rectangular plate. Common PRS practice size.

name: Rectangle 18x24 in
notes: 18x24 rectangular plate. Half-IPSC PRS practice size.

name: Rectangle 24x30 in
notes: 24x30 rectangular plate. Full IPSC-shape PRS rifle target.

name: Rectangle 24x36 in
notes: 24x36 rectangular plate. Long-range PRS / NRL plate.

name: Rectangle 36x48 in
notes: 36x48 rectangular plate. ELR backer / spotting target.

name: NRA SR-1 Reduced (100 yd)
notes: 100-yard reduced version of the SR target - used in NRA High Power Match Course.

name: NRA SR-21 (200 yd)
notes: 200-yard NRA Service Rifle target. 7-inch X-ring within 12-inch 10-ring.

name: NRA MR-1 (300 yd)
notes: 300-yard NRA Mid-Range target. 6-inch X-ring within 12-inch 10-ring.

name: NRA LR (600 yd)
notes: 600-yard NRA Long Range target. 12-inch X-ring within 24-inch 10-ring.

name: F-Class F-Open (1000 yd)
notes: 1000-yard F-Class target. 5-inch X-ring within 10-inch 10-ring.

name: F-Class F-T/R (600 yd)
notes: 600-yard F-Class Target Rifle target. 3-inch X-ring within 6-inch 10-ring.

name: Bullseye 25 yd Slow-Fire Pistol
notes: B-16 NRA pistol slow-fire target. Black bullseye on a light field.

name: Bullseye 50 yd Slow-Fire Pistol
notes: B-6 NRA pistol slow-fire target.

name: Texas Star
notes: Texas Star - central hub with five 8-inch satellite plates on radial arms. Hitting a plate shifts the balance and rotates the rig so the next plate moves into the sight picture.

name: Dueling Tree
notes: Pivoting plate rack - typically six 6-inch round plates that swing to the opposite side when hit.

name: Bear
notes: Black-bear vital-zone profile. Heart/lung zone roughly behind the front shoulder.

name: Wild Boar
notes: European wild boar profile with vital-zone overlay.

name: Whitetail Deer
notes: Whitetail deer broadside profile with ~8-inch heart/lung vital zone.

name: Mule Deer
notes: Mule deer broadside profile with vital-zone overlay.

name: Elk
notes: Elk broadside profile with ~12-inch heart/lung vital zone.

name: Coyote
notes: Coyote broadside profile with ~6-inch vital zone for varmint practice.

name: Pronghorn Antelope
notes: Pronghorn antelope broadside profile with ~6-inch vital zone.

name: Wild Hog
notes: North American wild hog profile with vital-zone overlay.

name: IPSC USPSA Classic 18 x 30
notes: Full-size USPSA / IPSC competition silhouette (45.7 x 76.2 cm). The reference target for action-pistol matches; A-zone scoring centered on the chest box, head box on top.

name: IPSC Classic Official 18.12 x 29.93
notes: Official IPSC Classic Target — 460 x 760 mm. Slightly different proportions than the USPSA Metric; used by IPSC Region matches outside the USA.

name: IPSC Classic Mini 18.12 x 22.84
notes: Reduced-height IPSC Classic — 460 x 580 mm. Same width as the full Classic, shorter overall for indoor / restricted-bay use.

name: IPSC Mini 12 x 20
notes: Mini USPSA / IPSC silhouette (~66% of full Classic). Used for distance training and indoor ranges.

name: IPSC A4 11.81 x 23.62
notes: IPSC A4-size target — 300 x 600 mm. Sized to print on a single A4 sheet for at-home practice.

name: IPSC Head Box 5.91 x 11.02
notes: USPSA / IPSC head box only — 150 x 280 mm. The high-value shoot-or-no-shoot zone, often used as a small standalone reduced-target drill.

name: Pepper Popper Full 7.87 x 33.46
notes: Full-size pepper popper — 85 cm tall, 20 cm wide at the head. Reactive falling silhouette used in action-pistol matches.

name: Pepper Popper Mini 7.87 x 22.05
notes: Mini pepper popper — 56 cm tall, 20 cm wide at the head. Same silhouette as the full popper at a reduced height.
